success.cloudPulled: Pulled the latest backup from cloud

error.noValidBackup: No valid backup files found in the sync folder.
error.unsupportedBackupVersion: This backup was created by a newer version of DeepChat and cannot be imported.
error.tempDbFailed: Failed to create temporary database backup file
error.tempConfigFailed: Failed to create temporary configuration backup file
error.importFailed: Import failed, original data has been restored
error.importProcess: An error occurred during the import process
error.encryptedBackupPasswordMissing: This backup is encrypted, but the local database key is not available. Unlock the encrypted database first, then import again.
error.overwriteEncryptionMismatch: Overwrite import requires the backup and current database to use the same encryption state.
error.cloudNotConfigured: Cloud is not configured. Fill in and save the cloud connection first.
error.cloudNoBackup: No backup available in the cloud bucket
error.cloudDownloadFailed: Failed to download backup from cloud
error.noLocalBackup: No local backup to upload. Run a backup first.
error.safeStorageUnavailable: System keychain unavailable; cannot securely store the secret key.
error.cloudUnauthorized: Cloud authentication failed. Check the endpoint, bucket, Access Key ID, Secret Access Key, and R2 token permissions.
